title: rhododendron × laetevirens
intro: Rhododendron × laetevirens, also known as the hybrid rhododendron or the green-leaved rhododendron, is a hybrid plant that comes from the combination of Rhododendron ponticum and Rhododendron hirsutum. The leaves of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron × laetevirens include the potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Rhododendron × laetevirens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in tinctures and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
